examples: Funnily enough, I met her only yesterday.
Funnily enough, I said the same thing myself only yesterday.
Funnily enough I can remember what I had for lunch on July 5th, 1956, but I've forgotten what I had for breakfast today.
Things began to calm down, funnily enough, right after Benitez finally lost his temper.
Funnily enough, more and more Americans are playing 'English' sports such as rugby and football.
